display.purpose: Hero h1 + login h1. One per page.

headline.purpose: Landing section headings + hero stage labels.

title.purpose: Card titles, settings group titles, builder panel headers.

label.purpose: Chips, kickers, status badges. Uppercase + 0.06em tracking.

mono.purpose: Code blocks, token tables, hex strings, DS code previews.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on chrome buttons. Active state response.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Login card ambient, dialog overlays, rare high-elevation panels.

shadows.name: shadow-focus
shadows.purpose: Canonical focus ring. Cyan halo across all interactive elements.

motion.name: dur-emphasis
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions, modal entry, dropdown reveal.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: Major state changes — page transitions, full-overlay entry.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: The uoaui spring. Use for everything except linear progress.

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Material standard ease. Reserved for builder chrome to match Material previews.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The signature CTA. Aurora gradient (Cyan → Solar Lilac), Outer Dark text, 46px tall, lift-on-hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(161,255,246,0.72); border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5ee7df 0%, #b490f5 48%, #b490f5 100%); color: #020302; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 18px 46px rgba(94,231,223,0.22), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.82); transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 180ms, background 180ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5ee7df 0%, #8b5cf6 46%, #8b5cf6 100%); box-shadow: 0 22px 54px rgba(94,231,223,0.3), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.86); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #5ee7df, 0 0 0 4px rgba(94,231,223,0.22), 0 18px 46px rgba(94,231,223,0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.62; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Builder chrome navigation. Minimal borders, lift-on-hover, active state tints to builder-accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #E8EAED; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), color 180ms, background 180ms, border-color 180ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #5ee7df, 0 0 0 4px rgba(94,231,223,0.22); } .ds-btn-ghost.is-active { border-color: #9575F0; background: rgba(149,117,240,0.10); color: #9575F0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Glass surface text input. Cyan focus ring (4px halo). Error border red.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 40px 0 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.11); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.055); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 180ms, box-shadow 180ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.38); } .ds-input:hover:not(:focus) { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(94,231,223,0.62); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.075); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(94,231,223,0.15); } .ds-input.has-error { border-color: rgba(255,120,120,0.62); }

components.name: Card Surface
components.description: Glassmorphism panel. Triple shadow (ambient + glow + inset), gradient overlay, blur 26px, radial mint glow.
components.html:
Decision
Salt DS is the right fit for your enterprise tooling.
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; min-width: 0; padding: 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.14), rgba(255,255,255,0.045)), radial-gradient(circle at 24% 0%, rgba(94,231,223,0.13), transparent 42%), rgba(8,12,22,0.82); box-shadow: 0 42px 140px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 120px rgba(59,130,246,0.12), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(26px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(26px); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; border-radius: inherit; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(94,231,223,0.12), transparent 38%, rgba(180,144,245,0.10)); opacity: 0.42; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.02rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.68; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }

components.name: Proof Chip
components.description: Proof / social-proof badge. Minimal bordered pill, uppercase Label typography.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 32px; padding: 0 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.74rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

narrative.overview: uoaui is built like an observatory — a calm vantage point from which to study moving phenomena. The aurora, the beam shader, the five design-system specimens on the workbench: all of it lives beneath a stable instrument-grade chrome. The phenomena move; the observer doesn't. That's the visual contract. This system explicitly rejects the four reflexes of category-coded AI tooling: it is not a SaaS dashboard, it is not the Tailwind / shadcn default, it is not crypto-on-black neon glow, and it is not bento-grid template feel.
keyCharacteristics: Flat tonal + functional glass. Surfaces flat at rest; shadows only on state change.
Solid and quiet components. Borders and tonal opacity do what cards usually do.
Aurora as constant, not ornament. Cyan / violet / rose ribbon ties hero, login, and builder.
Two-voice token system. Brand surfaces use #6750a4; builder chrome uses #9575F0 for legibility on glass.

rules.name: The Aurora-as-Constant Rule
rules.body: The aurora ribbon (cyan, violet, rose) appears on every brand surface as ambient atmosphere. Never break it into a single accent. Never recolor it to brand-primary alone. The ribbon IS uoaui.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Brand surfaces use Observatory Iris #6750a4. Builder chrome uses builder-accent #9575F0 (lighter violet, reads better on dark glass). Don't unify them.

rules.name: The Accent Restraint Rule
rules.body: The five-color accent set is reserved for stage markers, system status, and per-DS swatches. Total accent coverage per screen ≤8%.

rules.name: The One-Display Rule
rules.body: A page carries one Display element. Heroes and login screens only. Never use Display for section headings — that's Headline's job.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Label-Only Rule
rules.body: Uppercase + 0.06em tracking is reserved for the Label role. Never apply to Body, Title, or Headline. Uppercase Title is the SaaS cliché.

rules.name: The Functional Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows reserved for state change or genuine elevation. A card at rest has no shadow. Glass-morphic insets are not shadows; they are light treatment.

rules.name: The Cyan Focus Rule
rules.body: Focus rings use the aurora cyan halo, not the brand primary. Focus reads independent of brand theming, stays legible across builder-light / builder-dark / DS preview modes.

dos: Do anchor the brand surface in Observatory Iris #6750a4 + Solar Lilac #b490f5.
Do use the cyan focus ring on every interactive element.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. Use opacity stacks and 1px borders for depth.
Do cap body copy at 65–75ch line length.
Do preserve each DS's own tokens when rendering its preview.
donts: Don't look like a generic SaaS dashboard. No sidebar-nav + card-grid + stat-counter.
Don't use Tailwind / shadcn default look. No slate-gray-on-white, no rounded-md-card-grid, no Inter-everywhere.
Don't push toward crypto / AI neon-on-black aesthetic.
Don't lay out in bento grids.
Don't use uppercase + tracking on Body, Title, or Headline.
Don't drop shadow as default elevation.
Don't use border-left / border-right >1px as colored accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't treat the HeroBeam as decoration.
